name: Giant's Reign
descriptionTemplate: Recover 1 Arithmetica and gain [Arg1] {STR}. Increase a chosen Awakener's Aliemus by [Arg2]. If your Tentacle Stance is {Raging Waves}, instead gain +15% Temporary Crit. Rate & Crit. DMG.
lore:
The way of the conqueror is to never give up, to never admit defeat.

Even if the horizon has devoured the light, he will still lift the unquenchable sun with brawn.
